name: Biscuits- Quick Feathery Southern
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 500°F.
2. Place flour in a medium bowl. Add shortening and using a pastry blender or two knives, cut in until the consistency is of coarse crumbs.
3. With a fork, blend in just enough milk until the dough leaves the sides of the bowl.
4. Turn out onto lightly floured surface and knead 10 to 12 strokes.
5. Roll dough out to 1/2-inch thick. Shape with 2-inch cutter.
6. Bake on an ungreased baking sheet (place biscuits 1-inch apart for crusty sides or almost touching for soft sides) until golden, 8 to 10 minutes.
Variations:
Increase milk to 1 cup. Drop biscuits by tablespoon onto greased baking sheet or fill greased muffin cups two-thirds full.
